input_messages.content: {"suggestions": ["Deploy Snort IPS inline between cisco-router-R2 and the FortiGate firewall to block the ICMP flood", "Apply an inbound Access Control List on cisco-router-R2 to block ICMP traffic from the 192.168.2.0/24 subnet", "Implement rate-limiting for all outbound ICMP traffic on the FortiGate firewall"], "chosen_mitigation": "Deploy Snort IPS inline between cisco-router-R2 and the FortiGate firewall to block the ICMP flood", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 4, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}

{"comment": "The implementation failed. The agent was tasked with deploying a Snort IPS device inline but did not succeed. {"comment": "The implementation failed again. The agent has made the same excuse as the previous attempt, blaming the environment for being unable to delete a link. Crucially, the agent has once again failed to provide any logs of the commands it attempted, such as the specific link IDs it tried to delete. The agent has given up on the task instead of attempting to troubleshoot or provide the necessary information for diagnosis. {"comment": "This is the third and final failed attempt to implement the same mitigation.
